full_log: Coin flip: STORM wins the die roll, goes FIRST
6. Force of Will (instant, CMC 5, free counter)
Reason: 7 lands — too flooded, not enough spells; no action (threats, counters, or cantrips)
Keep best 6: Sanctum Prelate, Solitude, Plains, Karakas, Plains, Karakas
Bottom rationale: weakest by priority (counters > creatures > cantrips > other)
Reason: 4 lands — slightly land-heavy but playable; 2 threat(s) for a clock; removal for opponent's threats
